response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:35: Narrated intro segment. 2. 02:36-04:59: Vocal performance of '群青' (Gunjou) by YOASOBI, composed by Ayase, performed by Mizunyu. 3. Searched for lyrics using '群青 Ayase lyrics'. Found the official Japanese lyrics and translated them. 4. Verified the song title '群青' on-screen.
response.global_summary: The video features a narrated, 3D animated introductory segment leading into a vocal performance of the song "群青" (Gunjou) by YOASOBI, performed by the VTuber Mizunyu.

scenes.description: Narrated sequence featuring 3D animation and static imagery. No vocal music is playing.
Vocal performance of '群青' (Gunjou) by Mizunyu in a 3D stage environment. The song title '群青' and composer 'Ayase' appear on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
嗚呼、いつもの様に
過ぎる日々にあくびが出る
さんざめく夜、越え、今日も
渋谷の街に朝が降る
どこか虚しいような
そんな気持ち
知らず知らず隠してた
本当の声を響かせてよ、ほら
見ないフリしていても
確かにそこにある
感じたままに描く
自分で選んだその色で
眠い空気纏う朝に
訪れた青い世界
好きなものを好きだと言う
怖くて仕方ないけど
本当の自分
出会えた気がしたんだ
嗚呼、手を伸ばせば伸ばすほどに
遠くへゆく
思うようにいかない、今日も
また慌ただしくもがいてる
悔しい気持ちも
ただ情けなくて
涙が出る
踏み込むほど
苦しくなる
痛くもなる
感じたままに進む
自分で選んだこの道を
重いまぶた擦る夜に
しがみついた青い誓い
好きなことを続けること
それは「楽しい」だけじゃない
本当にできる? 不安になるけど
何枚でも ほら何枚でも
自信がないから描いてきたんだよ
何回でも ほら何回でも
積み上げてきたことが武器になる
周りを見たって 誰と比べたって
僕にしかできないことはなんだ
今でも自信なんかない
感じたことない気持ち
知らずにいた想い
あの日踏み出して
初めて感じたこの痛みも全部
好きなものと向き合うことで
触れたまだ小さな光
大丈夫、行こう、あとは楽しむだけだ
全てを賭けて描く
自分にしか出せない色で
朝も夜も走り続け
見つけ出した青い光
好きなものと向き合うこと
今だって怖いことだけど
もう今はあの日の透明な僕じゃない
かけがえの無い僕だ
知らず知らず隠してた
本当の声を響かせてよ、ほら
見ないフリしていても
確かにそこに今もそこにあるよ
知らず知らず隠してた
本当の声を響かせてよ、さあ
見ないフリしていても
確かにそこに君の中に
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Ah, I yawn at the passing days as always
Passing the noisy nights, morning descends on the streets of Shibuya again today
That somewhat empty feeling, I was hiding it unknowingly
Let your true voice resonate, look
Even if you pretend not to see it, it is definitely there
Draw as you feel, with the colors you chose yourself
On a morning wrapped in sleepy air, a blue world visited
To say I love what I love, though I am unbearably scared
I felt like I finally met my true self
Ah, the more I reach out, the further it goes
Today too, things don't go as planned, I'm struggling busily again
The frustrating feeling, just pathetic, tears fall
The more I step in, the more painful it becomes, it even hurts
Proceed as you feel, on this path you chose yourself
On a night rubbing heavy eyelids, a blue vow I clung to
Continuing to do what you love, it's not just "fun"
Can I really do it? I get anxious but
No matter how many sheets, look, no matter how many sheets
Because I have no confidence, I kept drawing them
No matter how many times, look, no matter how many times
The things I've built up become my weapon
Even if I look around, even if I compare myself to someone
What is the thing only I can do?
Even now I have no confidence
Feelings I've never felt before, feelings I didn't know
Taking that step that day, all this pain I felt for the first time
By facing what I love, the still small light I touched
It's okay, let's go, all that's left is to enjoy it
Drawing, betting everything, with the color only I can produce
Continuing to run through morning and night, the blue light I found
Facing what I love, even now it's scary but
Already now I am not the transparent me of that day
I am an irreplaceable me
That somewhat empty feeling, I was hiding it unknowingly
Let your true voice resonate, look
Even if you pretend not to see it, it's definitely still there today
That somewhat empty feeling, I was hiding it unknowingly
Let your true voice resonate, come on
Even if you pretend not to see it, it's definitely there, inside you.
